channel.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports
channel.description: Capitalist ME offers global news, in-depth coverage on business, politics, finance, culture, sports, and the latest world events. Stay informed on key issues

image.title: Capitalist ME: Global News, Business, Politics, Finance and Sports

item.title: UK and Switzerland strike landmark £5.2bn services trade deal to boost business growth
item.description:
A landmark UK-Switzerland services trade deal will boost UK exports by £5.2 billion annually, simplify business travel, and strengthen digital and professional services.

Key points:
• UK services exports could increase by approximately £5.2 billion per year.
• Business professionals can work in the other country for up to 90 days annually without a visa.
• The agreement enhances digital trade, intellectual property protections, and removes roaming charges for travellers.
• Financial, legal, technology, engineering, and consulting sectors are expected to benefit from easier market access and stronger economic ties.

Read the full article: UK and Switzerland strike landmark £5.2bn services trade deal to boost business growth
